items.title: One-command install
items.detail: a curl | sh bootstrap with an interactive CLI config wizard.

items.title: Migrate from Hermes
items.detail: a script that imports an existing Hermes agent into protoAgent.

items.title: Migrate from OpenClaw
items.detail: a script that imports an existing OpenClaw agent into protoAgent.

items.title: Federation token follow-ups
items.detail: management UI, peer rotation, and fleet integration for ADR 0066 tokens.

items.title: Rewind a chat thread
items.detail: jump a conversation back to an earlier message and branch from there.

items.title: Plugin management from the rail
items.detail: uninstall a plugin from the rail context menu and a plugin-management settings panel.

items.title: Plugin version + update
items.detail: show the installed version inline with an "update if available" action.

items.title: Live Work panel
items.detail: reflect goal, task, and schedule changes as they happen, without a manual refresh.

items.title: /compact
items.detail: summarize and archive a long chat thread in a single command.

items.title: Developer flags
items.detail: gate pre-release work behind local feature flags, with a Settings ▸ Developer panel.

items.title: Watches
items.detail: supervise many external conditions at once as a first-class primitive.
